REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT PAUL ROBERTSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 27, 2015 FOR DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN JANUARY 30, 2015. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: N. WONG; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-27-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT PAUL ROBERTSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT HE IS THE SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BOTH THE PROPERTY AND LANDLORD. THIS IS SUFFICIENT. WITH RESPECT TO THE DEFENDANT'S THIRD CLAIM-THE ATTACHED LEASE AGREEMENT IS INCOMPLETE-THE PLAINTIFF'S ATTACHMENT INCLUDES ALL OF THE ESSENTIAL TERMS THAT ARE RELEVANT TO THE COMPLAINT AS ALLEGED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Continued To Jun-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PAUL ROBERTSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. The plaintiff alleges that he is the successor in interest to both the property and landlord. This is sufficient. With respect to the defendant's third claim-the attached lease agreement is incomplete-the plaintiff's attachment includes all of the essential terms that are relevant to the complaint as alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Continued To Feb-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No apperance by either side.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PAUL ROBERTSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Continued to February 27, 2015 for Defendant to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than January 30, 2015.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported
